calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA BROWN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff Miladys Magali Boquin shall serve verified, objection-free responses to defendant Christina Brown's first set of form interrogatories within three weeks of this order. The failure to respond lacked substantial justification. The court awards reasonable sanctions of $750 to defendant. Plaintiff shall pay the sanction within 30 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAHESH BAHADUR SHAH'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF MILADYS MAGALI BOQUIN'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff Miladys Magali Boquin shall serve verified, objection-free responses to defendant Mahesh Bahadur Shah's first set of form interrogatories, first set of special interrogatories, and first set of requests for production of documents within three weeks of this order. The failure to respond lacked substantial justification. The court awards reasonable sanctions of $1200 to defendant. Plaintiff shall pay the sanction within 30 days. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
